name: lyra-security-secrets
description: Secrets lifecycle management: git prohibition with rotate-before-cleanup, three-layer scanning, .env hygiene, storage hierarchy from managed stores to file-mounted container secrets, OIDC identities over static keys, issuance-time scoping, rehearsed rotation, log/URL/LLM-prompt exposure control, leak runbook, and credential inventory. Integrates with lyra-security-appsec, lyra-security-supply-chain, lyra-ci-cd-automation, lyra-podman-deploy.
